texto: A man can lead a reasonably full life without a family, a fixed local residence, or a religious affiliation, but if he is stateless he is nothing. He has no rights, no security, and little opportunity for a useful career. There is no salvation on earth outside the framework of an organized state.
explicacao: Citação de Joseph Reese Strayer sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A man can lead a reasonably full life without a family, a fixed local residence, or a religious a…” articula trabalho, government, rights em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e rights.
